markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the company makes the specified announcement.
markets.no_sub_title: Yes
markets.rules_primary: If International Energy Agency (IEA) officially approves a release of oil from member countries' strategic reserves before Mar 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
## Announcement Requirements

**Qualifying sources** (official company channels only):
- Press releases
- SEC filings (8-K, 10-K, 10-Q)
- Earnings calls or investor presentations
- Verified social media accounts
- Official statements to media, subsequently confirmed by the company
- CEO statements through any of the above channels

**Disqualifying sources:**
- Rumors, speculation, or unconfirmed reports
- Leaked information
- Third-party announcements without company confirmation
- Preliminary discussions

## Additional Rules
- The announcement must occur **after market issuance**
- Companies are tracked through rebranding and name changes representing the same legal business entity
